summary.lv: WorkingDay Latvia meklē IT tehniskā atbalsta speciālistu klientam ADATI ar 3+ gadu pieredzi 1., 2. un 3. līmeņa atbalsta sniegšanā, aparatūras, programmatūras un tīkla problēmu risināšanā.
summary.en: WorkingDay Latvia is seeking an IT Technical Support Specialist for client ADATI with 3+ years of experience providing 1st, 2nd, and 3rd level support, resolving hardware, software, and network issues.
